dailyNews.title: Special Report: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump has fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, after expressing frustration regarding her tenure, according to sources. Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche is expected to step in as acting attorney general following Bondi's departure.

dailyNews.title: Trump Vows to Hit Iran 'Extremely Hard' in Coming Weeks
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump delivered a prime-time address to the nation on Wednesday, declaring military success against Iran and making his case for what he says will be several more weeks of war. "We're going to hit them extremely hard over the next two to three weeks. We're going to bring them back to the Stone Ages where they belong," he says. Iran has responded saying, the U.S. hasn’t destroyed key targets and that it won’t open the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Meet

dailyNews.title: 'We had to do it ourselves': Trump forges ahead in Iran without traditional U.S. allies
dailyNews.description: In his prime-time speech, President Donald Trump argued that the U.S. had to act on its own to neutralize the threat from Iran because many of America’s allies wouldn’t help.

dailyNews.title: Oil soars past $110 after Trump's Iran war address
dailyNews.description: Stocks dropped sharply and oil prices surged after Donald Trump's address about the Iran war failed to assure markets that the conflict would end soon.

dailyNews.title: Trump appointee-led commission approves White House ballroom plans
dailyNews.description: The National Capital Planning Commission on Thursday voted to approve President Donald Trump's plans to build a new White House ballroom, which has faced steep opposition from critics

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll sign order to pay all DHS workers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that he would soon sign an order to pay all employees of the Department of Homeland Security, which has been shut down for over 40 days

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise after Trump insists the Iran war is going to plan
dailyNews.description: One market analyst says Trump warning the Iran war will take 2-3 more weeks, without a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, "was far less than" investors had hoped for.
